'''Rorq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mawan (species)|Mawan]], and a native of [[Mawan/Legends|Mawan]].

In the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Rorq worked on fuel transport tunnels for his homeworld's capital city of [[Naatan]].

Following the planet's disastrous [[Great Purge|civil war]], he worked as a "subrat" tunnel worker in Naatan's underground infrastructure.

In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], he acted as a guide, alongside his friend [[Swanny Mull]], for [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] during their mission to Mawan.

Rorq had long, gleaming dark hair and a short but muscular build.

==Behind the scenes==
Rorq is erroneously described as 'white-haired' in his character entry in ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia, ''confusing him with his fellow tunnel worker Swanny Mull, whose 'white hair' description therein is correct.
